login.subtitle: Access the administration dashboard for platform owners and school administrators

login.sidePanelDescription: Comprehensive administration tools for platform owners and school administrators. Manage organizations, users, classes, and analytics all in one place.
login.orgLoginSubtitle: Use your account to access this organization.
login.orgLoginDefaultTagline: Sign in to access your courses, classes, and resources.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot
forgotPassword.description: For ERP (admin) accounts, contact your platform or school administrator to reset your password. If you are a teacher or student, use the SAAS portal to reset your password.
forgotPassword.goToSaasPortal: I'm a teacher or student — go to SAAS portal

orgPublic.aboutFallback: Welcome to {name}. We are committed to quality education and building a strong learning community.
orgPublic.flowOrganizeDescription: Manage teachers, students, and class structure from one control plane.
orgPublic.flowTeachDescription: Deliver lessons and assessments with consistent workflows.
orgPublic.flowMonitorDescription: Track cohort progress and institutional performance.
orgPublic.flowOperateDescription: Keep academic operations reliable across teams.
orgPublic.spotlightDescription: Access your classes, teaching tools, and academic operations dashboard.

footer.brandDescription: Comprehensive ERP solution for managing educational institutions, resources, and operations.
